SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls

Class TlsRecordLayer

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.TlsRecordLayer
public class TlsRecordLayer extends Object
TLS record layer I/O for reading and writing TLS records. Handles the 5-byte record header (type, version, length) and record payload. This is adapted from the existing CipherSuiteUtil OutputRecord and CipherSuiteUtilInputRecord classes but consolidated into a single class.

      Flush the output buffer, writing a complete record.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • setExpectedType

      public void setExpectedType(int expectedType)
      Set the expected record type for input. Alert records are still processed.

      Get the version from the last read record.

    • readRecord

      public byte[] readRecord() throws IOException, TlsException
      Read a complete TLS record and return the payload. Does NOT consume the record from the input buffer.
      Returns:
      Record payload bytes
      Throws:
      IOException
      TlsException

    • readHandshakeMessage

      public TlsRecordLayer.HandshakeMessage readHandshakeMessage() throws IOException, TlsException
      Read a handshake message. Returns the message type and full message bytes.
      Returns:
      HandshakeMessage containing type and data
      Throws:
      IOException
      TlsException

    • getLastRecordHeader

      public byte[] getLastRecordHeader()
      Get the 5-byte record header from the last readRecord() call. Used for TLS 1.3 AEAD additional authenticated data.
